title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now integrates local AI model providers including LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, allowing developers to run Gemma-4 12B, Qwen-3.6, and other open-source models for coding assistance directly on local machines without relying on cloud APIs.
